caption: The video features a person unboxing a pack of '21-22 NBA Trading Cards' from the Mosaic series, which contains 15 cards. The pack is prominently displayed, showcasing its vibrant design with an image of a basketball player and the NBA logo. The person carefully turns the pack to show different angles, including the back side with text and a barcode. In the background, there is a blurred view of a basketball court, adding context to the theme of the trading cards. Additionally, a live stream interface is visible on the right side of the screen, indicating that this unboxing is being broadcasted online. The streamer interacts with viewers through a chat box, providing links for more information and engaging with comments. The setting appears to be a professional studio or a well-equipped room designed for live streaming, with various equipment and branding visible.
